name: swc-plugin-tachys
description: SWC-based JSX compiler for Tachys. Produces the same CompiledIR and emitted output as babel-plugin-tachys, but parses via @swc/core so SWC-based toolchains (Vite, Next.js, Bun) can use the Tachys fast path without Babel.
author: Josh Burgess

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && rollup -c rollup.config.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp dist/index.d.ts dist/index.d.cts
